name: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc.
business: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. provides highly engineered products and support services for oil and natural gas well construction, well completion, and field development. Its primary offering is fracturing systems that enable pinpoint stimulation, and it also sells composite and dissolvable frac plugs through its Repeat Precision joint venture, as well as tracer diagnostics and well construction products.

exposures.sentence: We provide our products and services primarily to E&P companies for use in onshore and offshore wells, predominantly those that have been drilled with horizontal laterals in both unconventional and conventional oil and natural gas formations.

Advancements in drilling and well completion technologies and processes, including emerging AI and machine learning technologies, could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations and cash flows.

catalysts.sentence: We plan to incur approximately $1.4 million to $1.8 million in capital expenditures during 2026
The Court of Appeal... remanded the matter to the trial court for further proceedings, with a redetermination hearing scheduled for September 2026.

catalysts.event: Renewal of Repeat Precision promissory note
catalysts.sentence: We expect to renew the Repeat Precision Promissory Note prior to its maturity.
